title: Debunk simulation 2. Steps to perform the debunk & debunk models
author: Arcos, Rubén
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: The aim of this Open Education Resource is to guide students through the practical steps and models involved in the debunking process. It provides a comprehensive understanding of the process, from identifying and selecting suspicious content to evaluating the credibility of sources, claims, and evidence. Through interactive features like clickable hotspots on a poster, students can delve deeper into each aspect. This resource equips learners with the skills to critically assess information, spot misinformation, and produce effective debunking content. It emphasizes the importance of peer review and dissemination in promoting accuracy and countering the spread of false information, ultimately fostering a more informed and vigilant society. The interactive OER is available at this link: https://view.genial.ly/650722ffa8040f0011bb2596 | This OER was developed in collaboration between: "Mihai Viteazul" National Intelligence Academy (MVNIA) - Romania, Cyberimaginario Research Group of Rey Juan Carlos University - Spain, L-Università ta' Malta and New Strategy Center - Romania.
